rules.explanation: Mixing bleach and ammonia produces toxic chloramine vapors.
precautions: Do not mix under any circumstances.
Ensure high ventilation if used in the same area.

rules.explanation: Mixing acids and bases causes an exothermic neutralization reaction.
precautions: Add acid to water, not water to acid.

rules.explanation: Strong acids can dehydrate ethanol, potentially causing boiling or splashing.
Highly exothermic neutralization producing salt and water. Can cause steam explosions if concentrated.
precautions: Perform on ice bath for large scales.
